description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a natural light wood finish, featuring a spacious flat top surface suitable for writing or computer work. On the right side, there are two drawers stacked vertically above a larger cabinet door, all with minimalist integrated handles. The left side of the desk is open, providing ample legroom beneath the work surface. The back panel is solid, with a single circular cable management hole near the bottom left corner. The sides of the desk are plain, showcasing the wood grain pattern without any additional features. The overall construction appears sturdy and functional, with clean lines and a modern, utilitarian design.
description: A light wood desk with two drawers, a cabinet, and an open leg space, featuring a clean, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open leg space, two drawers, and a cabinet door on the right.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying a plain wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid wood panel with a circular cable management hole.
description_view_3: Left side view displaying a plain wood panel matching the right side.
attribute_orientation: The side with the open leg space, drawers, and cabinet is intended to face the user, serving as the functional front of the desk.
